name: R F INDUSTRIES LTD
summary: RF Industries, Ltd. is a national manufacturer and marketer of interconnect products and systems, including RF connectors and adapters, coaxial cables, fiber optic cables, custom cabling, wire harnesses, dividers, directional couplers, filters, energy-efficient cooling systems, and integrated small cell enclosures. The company serves telecommunications carriers, wireless and network infrastructure manufacturers, and OEMs. Operations are conducted through facilities in California and the Northeastern United States, with products distributed through national distributors and direct OEM accounts.

products.name: RF Connectors and Adapters
products.description: Coaxial connectors and adapters facilitating analog and digital signal transmission across various frequencies.

products.name: Coaxial Cable Assemblies
products.description: Standard and custom coaxial cables attached to connectors for communications applications, over 100,000 combinations.

products.name: Fiber Optic Cables
products.description: Custom fiber optic connectivity solutions manufactured by Cables Unlimited, backed by Corning Cable Systems warranty.

products.name: RF and Microwave Products
products.description: High-performance signal distribution products for in-building DAS, wireless base stations, and small cell networks by Microlab.

products.name: Dividers, Directional Couplers and Filters
products.description: Passive RF components for signal distribution and connectivity applications.

products.name: Energy-Efficient Cooling Systems
products.description: Designed, engineered, and manufactured cooling systems for energy efficiency.

products.name: Integrated Small Cell Enclosures
products.description: Integrated small cell solutions and related components for wireless network deployment.

products.name: Wire Harnesses
products.description: Custom wire harness assemblies for interconnect applications.

products.name: Data Cables
products.description: Data cable products for various connectivity and communications applications.

partnerships.description: Cables Unlimited is a Corning Cable Systems CAH Connections Gold Program member authorized to manufacture fiber optic products with extended warranty.
Administrative agent for senior secured revolving credit facilities totaling up to $16 million under the EBC Credit Agreement.
